summary: Iteration 14 - Essay Scorer Overhaul Testing. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. POST /api/essay/score returns overallScore, assessmentType, scoringMode, scoreBreakdown with strengths, overallImpression, optInPrompt. POST /api/essay/deep-feedback returns criterionFeedback with socraticQuestions, gapAnalysis, connectToTheBiggerPicture. Frontend Essay Scorer page has 3 upload zones (essay, rubric, brief), scoring mode indicator, guided tour, and two-phase display (strengths-first, then opt-in deep feedback).

issues: Minor React warning: 'Cannot update component while rendering' - cosmetic, not functional

POST /api/essay/score without rubric returns Mode 3 scoring

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/essay/score correctly implements 3 scoring modes: Mode 1 (rubric), Mode 2 (brief), Mode 3 (essay only)
EssayScorerRequest model properly includes essay_text (required), rubric_text (optional), brief_text (optional)
EssayDeepFeedbackRequest model includes initial_scores field for passing Phase 1 results
Essay scorer response includes all required fields: overallScore, assessmentType, scoringMode, scoringModeNote, scoreBreakdown, overallImpression, optInPrompt
scoreBreakdown includes strengths array per criterion as per strengths-first philosophy
Deep feedback response includes criterionFeedback with socraticQuestions, gapAnalysis, connectToTheBiggerPicture
EssayScorer.js correctly implements two-phase display: Phase 1 (strengths-first) and Phase 2 (opt-in deep feedback)
Frontend correctly shows scoring mode indicator that updates based on uploaded documents
GuidedTour component works on essay scorer page with localStorage key 'simplifii_tour_essay'

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 complete. Essay Scorer overhaul tested. Two endpoints: (1) POST /api/essay/score - accepts essay_text (required), rubric_text (optional), brief_text (optional). Returns overallScore, assessmentType, scoringMode (Mode 1/2/3), scoringModeNote, scoreBreakdown with strengths per criterion, overallImpression, optInPrompt. (2) POST /api/essay/deep-feedback - accepts essay_text, rubric_text, brief_text, initial_scores (JSON string). Returns criterionFeedback with socraticQuestions, gapAnalysis, connectToTheBiggerPicture. Frontend at /essay-scorer has 3 upload zones, scoring mode indicator, guided tour. Two-phase display: Phase 1 shows strengths-first feedback, Phase 2 (opt-in) shows deep feedback with Socratic questions. LLM calls take 20-60 seconds. Cookie-based auth working.
